query:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN m.weight = 0 THEN 'zero' ELSE 'non-zero' END as weight_type,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(CAST(m.weight AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_weight
FROM mappings m
JOIN competencies c ON m.competencyId = c.id
WHERE c.gaId = 1
GROUP BY weight_type;
